rationale: Keep: the cited paper directly studies long-term effects of product line length, distribution breadth, and price-related outcomes, which closely overlaps the citing paper’s core elasticity constructs (line length, price, distribution) and stated goal of extending prior long-term marketing-mix evidence. Given this strong conceptual/methodological proximity and an exact DOI match in the reference list (10.1509/jmkr.47.5.866), this is not safely an incidental mention.
